commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
If. Hebrew, "surely. "(Houbigant)
From me. How long shall I be forced to live among the enemies of the Lord? (Calmet)
Since he will reward the good, and punish the wicked eternally, I renounce the society of the latter. (Worthington)
He specifies murderers, as he had described the wonderful formation of man. (Menochius)
